pr.title: chore: change default model to MiniMax-M2.7
pr.body:
## Summary

Changes the default model from `claude-opus-4-5-20251101` to `minimax-m2.7` for the model profiles launch co-promotion with MiniMax.

## Changes

### `openhands/app_server/utils/llm.py`
- `DEFAULT_OPENHANDS_MODEL` → `'openhands/minimax-m2.7'` (was `'openhands/claude-opus-4-5-20251101'`)
- This controls the `default_model` field returned by `/api/options/models`

### `enterprise/server/constants.py`
- Added version **6** → `'minimax-m2.7'` to `PERSONAL_WORKSPACE_VERSION_TO_MODEL`
- This sets the default model for new Cloud users and triggers migration for existing users still on the previous default

## Related
- Frontend counterpart: OpenHands/agent-canvas (separate PR)
- `minimax-m2.7` is already a verified model in the SDK — no SDK changes needed

---
_This PR was created by an AI agent (OpenHands) on behalf of the user._

@VascoSch92 can click here to [continue refining the PR](https://app.all-hands.dev/conversations/56833866-53be-4010-ac5c-f195c48037e6)

---

To run this PR locally, use the following command:

GUI with Docker:
```
docker run -it --rm   -p 3000:3000   -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock   --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway   --name openhands-app-5b6aa2c   docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:5b6aa2c
```
